task_goal: Add a location marker for Planken, Liechtenstein in the OsmAnd maps app.
task_goal_rewrite: A location marker for Planken, Liechtenstein is successfully added and visible within the OsmAnd maps app.

checkpoints.description: The OsmAnd maps app is opened and actively displaying its main map interface.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot/trace showing the OsmAnd app's main map screen loaded and in view.

checkpoints.description: The search function in OsmAnd is accessed, and 'Planken, Liechtenstein' is entered as the search query.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot/trace showing the OsmAnd search bar with 'Planken, Liechtenstein' typed in, or the search results page for this query.

checkpoints.description: The search result for Planken, Liechtenstein is selected to navigate its location on the map.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot/trace showing the map centered on Planken, Liechtenstein, with the location's details displayed (e.g., a pop-up card for Planken).

checkpoints.description: The marker creation function (e.g., 'Add marker' option) is initiated for the Planken, Liechtenstein location.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot/trace showing the 'Add marker' menu/option selected for the Planken location, or the marker creation form open.

checkpoints.description: The marker for Planken, Liechtenstein is saved and visible on the OsmAnd map.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot/trace showing a persistent marker icon placed at the Planken, Liechtenstein location on the map, with confirmation that the marker was saved successfully.

success_rule: All required checkpoints are completed, and a persistent location marker for Planken, Liechtenstein is visible and saved within the OsmAnd maps app.
